transactions.desc: The Pittsburgh Pirates traded LHP Joe La Sorsa to the Boston Red Sox.
The White Sox reinstated Gilbert from the family medical emergency list Thursday.
The Astros designated Thomas for assignment Thursday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Astros designated Salazar for assignment Thursday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Astros optioned Cole to Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Astros reinstated Loperfido (quad/foot) from the injured list Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Sugar Land, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Astros selected Price's contract from Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Royals selected Rojas' contract from Triple-A Omaha on Thursday.
The Cincinnati Reds traded RHP Kyle Nicolas to the Baltimore Orioles. The Orioles then optioned him to the minors.
The Blue Jays designated Andrews for assignment Thursday.
The Blue Jays selected Dallas' contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Thursday.
The Blue Jays optioned Juenger to Triple-A Buffalo on Thursday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Abner from Triple-A Reno on Thursday, Steve Gilbert of MLB.com reports.
The Diamondbacks recalled Strowd from Triple-A Reno on Thursday, Steve Gilbert of MLB.com reports.
The Diamondbacks optioned Pfaadt to Triple-A Reno on Thursday, Steve Gilbert of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles acquired Nicolas from the Reds on Thursday in exchange for cash considerations.
The Red Sox optioned Samaniego to Triple-A Worcester on Thursday, Christopher Smith of MassLive.com reports.
Atlanta selected Keirsey's contract Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Gwinnett.
The Los Angeles Angels traded C Austin Wynns to the Atlanta Braves.
Atlanta selected Wynns' contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
Atlanta designated Tromp for assignment Thursday.
The Red Sox selected Kahnle's contract from Triple-A Worcester on Thursday, Christopher Smith of MassLive.com reports.
The White Sox optioned Murphy to Triple-A Charlotte on Thursday.
The Blue Jays acquired Woods Richardson from the Twins on Wednesday in exchange for cash, Mitch Bannon of The Athletic reports.
The Minnesota Twins traded RHP Simeon Woods Richardson to the Toronto Blue Jays.
Pushard cleared waivers Wednesday and was returned to the Marlins, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.
The Angels optioned Aldegheri to Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Angels selected Anderson's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Giants recalled Smith from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday, reports Susan Slusser of the San Francisco Chronicle.
The Brewers recalled Gasser from Triple-A Nashville on Wednesday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.
